WorkoutDescription:
POST-RACE RECOVERY
No running. Walk 20-30min. Foam roll gently. Compression. Protein 1.8g/kg, carbs high. Sleep 9h+ (stock up — July is coming).

Easy walk 30min flat.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
Full rest. Gentle stretching 10min. Order the home trainer THIS WEEK so it arrives before July.
EASY SWIM 30min. Pull buoy ok. Pure circulation work.

Walk 45min, light hills ok.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
EASY SPIN 1h flat, cadence 90+, HR <138.
Rest. Review the block ahead: 5 BIG weeks before baby (~Jul 15), then flexible menu mode. The work you bank in June = your race in September.
Full rest.

FIRST RUN BACK — 30min flat, HR <138. Walk breaks if HR drifts.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Easy run 40min flat.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 3x6 @50% (reintro — light) 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats
Easy 40min + 5x20s relaxed strides. Legs check: any post-race niggle = report and adjust.
Full rest. Nice logistics: book accommodation + transport now (race Sept 26).
Rolling trail 1h15. Mostly Z1-Z2. Relaxed.
Easy hike 1h30 with poles. Re-groove pole rhythm.

AM — EASY RUN (fasted, last month for these) 45min flat.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — HILL REPEATS
10min warm-up. 6x4min on 10-15% grade at Z3 (153-168). Walk down, HR <140 before next rep. 10min cool-down.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Easy 45min.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose
SALÈVE CLIMB 2h15. Ascent ~1h30 poles, 400-450 m/h, Z2. Descent 45min controlled, quick steps, no braking.
Full rest.
LONG RUN 2h30 Z2. Gut training starts NOW: 90g carbs/h on every run >1h30 — this is a free performance gain.
Recovery jog 45min or rest.

AM — easy run (fasted) 50min.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — HILL REPEATS 7x4min Z3, same protocol as W3.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Easy 45min.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose
SALÈVE 2h45 — climb, descend halfway, re-climb (1,000m D+). Nice has 4 major cols: re-climbing on tired legs is THE specific skill.
Full rest.

LONG RUN 4h. Z2 cap, walk all climbs with poles, run everything runnable. Full race fueling: 90g carbs/h, salt /45min, 500-700ml/h.
GYPAÈTE LESSON: descents CONTROLLED — cadence 85+, no hero descending (your max HR at Gypaète was in the km 20 descent, not a climb).
Easy trail jog 1h on tired legs.

Easy 45min.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — DOWNHILL REPEATS (the Gypaète lesson)
15min warm-up climb easy with poles. 6x3min hard-but-controlled downhill on moderate technical trail (~-10%): cadence 85+, soft knees, eyes 3m ahead. Hike back up easy. 10min cool-down.
Builds the eccentric armor for km 90-109.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Easy 40min.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose
Full rest. Prep both routes + all nutrition for the biggest weekend before baby arrives.
Shakeout 30min Z1.

WEEK-END CHOC DAY 1 — 5h, 40km / 2,400m D+.
Z2 ceiling. Climbs 450 m/h poles. Descents controlled-firm, cadence 85+.
Full race protocol: 90g carbs/h, salt /45min, 500-700ml/h, caffeine 100mg at h3.
This weekend is moved UP from August — bank it before the baby.

WEEK-END CHOC DAY 2 — 2h30 on heavy legs. Teaches the body to move in depleted state = km 80-109 at Nice.
Z1-Z2 only. Keep fueling 60-70g/h. After this: the foundation is built. Everything from here is maintenance + sharpening.

BABY ETA ~JUL 15. Everything this week is OPTIONAL and interruptible. Family first — a missed week here costs nothing, the work is banked.

Rest (recommended after the choc weekend) or easy trainer spin 30-45min.

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.

BABY ETA ~JUL 15. Everything this week is OPTIONAL and interruptible. Family first — a missed week here costs nothing, the work is banked.

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.

BABY ETA ~JUL 15. Everything this week is OPTIONAL and interruptible. Family first — a missed week here costs nothing, the work is banked.

Easy run 40min if a window opens. Otherwise trainer or nothing.

BABY ETA ~JUL 15. Everything this week is OPTIONAL and interruptible. Family first — a missed week here costs nothing, the work is banked.

Rest or 15min stretching. Sleep when the baby sleeps.

BABY ETA ~JUL 15. Everything this week is OPTIONAL and interruptible. Family first — a missed week here costs nothing, the work is banked.

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.

BABY ETA ~JUL 15. Everything this week is OPTIONAL and interruptible. Family first — a missed week here costs nothing, the work is banked.

IF family coverage allows: 1h30 trail with vert. If not, trainer 45min or nothing — zero guilt either way.

BABY ETA ~JUL 15. Everything this week is OPTIONAL and interruptible. Family first — a missed week here costs nothing, the work is banked.

Family day. Congratulations, papa.

MENU WEEK RULES (newborn mode — days are SUGGESTIONS, swap freely):
P1 (non-negotiable, negotiate the slot with your partner): the weekend mountain run.
P2 (important): one hill/downhill session ~1h.
P3 (filler): home trainer blocks during naps — accumulate what you can.
SLEEP RULES: <5h sleep = no intensity today, trainer Z2 instead. Resting HR +8bpm = full rest day.
No fasted sessions until further notice — your cortisol is high enough.

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.

SLEEP RULES: <5h sleep = no intensity today, trainer Z2 instead. Resting HR +8bpm = full rest day.

P2 — HILL REPEATS 6x3min Z3 (shortened newborn version). 10min warm-up/cool-down.
Skip if <5h sleep — trainer Z2 instead.

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.

After the ride: STRENGTH EXPRESS (30min, home, no gym needed)
Designed for the newborn period — can be split in 2x15min.
A. Bulgarian Split Squat (backpack or DB) — 3x8/leg, slow 3s descent
B. Step-ups on stairs/chair — 3x10/leg, controlled down
C. Single-leg Calf Raises — 2x12/leg
D. Romanian Deadlift (any weight, even baby-carrier loaded backpack) — 3x8
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Side Plank 30s/side | Dead Bug 10/side
The eccentric work here protects your quads for 5,400m of descent — do NOT skip it.

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.
Rest. Confirm tomorrow's P1 window with your partner. Prep kit + nutrition tonight (one-handed packing skills).

P1 — MOUNTAIN RUN 2h30, 1,000m D+. Z2, poles on climbs, controlled descents. 90g carbs/h.
Short on time? Maximize D+ per hour instead of distance.
Family day. Stroller walk = active recovery. If Saturday's P1 was missed, THIS is the backup slot.

Full rest. PLAN THE SIMULATION: next Saturday is the non-negotiable 50K dress rehearsal — lock the family logistics for it NOW.
Moderate 2h Z2. Absorb the menu block. GYPAÈTE CHECK: this week, compare resting HR to June baseline.
Family day. Early night — big week coming.

Last strength of the heavy phase.

15min warm-up, 35min continuous climb at race effort (148-158) with poles, easy descent, cool-down.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.
Full rest. Prep THE dress rehearsal: exact race kit, exact nutrition, pacing card. Sleep maximum possible (tag-team the night feeds if you can).
Shakeout 30min.

RACE SIMULATION — 6h30, ~50km / 3,000m D+. THE non-negotiable session, 4 weeks out.
Start at race time (~5am) with headlamp — bonus: you're up anyway. Full kit.
Exact race nutrition: 90g carbs/h, C90 hourly, bar every 2h, salt /45min, caffeine at h3 then every 3h.
PACING (= Nice plan): climbs 450-500 m/h Z2 poles | flats 6:30-7:00/km | descents controlled-firm cadence 85+ — NOT Gypaète-km-20 style.
Walk ALL climbs. NEVER exceed Z3. If avg HR >130 at halfway, slow down.
No Sunday session this time — simulation only, then home to the family.
Full rest with the family. Legs up when possible. Eat big.
Full rest after simulation.

Easy 45min.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
SALÈVE 2h30 — final full climb. Race effort Z2, poles. Firm descent, perfect technique.

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.
Full rest.
LONG RUN 3h Z2. Last 40min at race effort. Final fueling rehearsal. After this: the hay is in the barn.
Family day. Stroller walk.

Easy 40min.

STRENGTH maintenance: 2x8 split squats, 2x8/leg step-ups, core x2. NO eccentric overload from now on.

Hill repeats 5x3min Z3 — keep legs sharp, reduced volume.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

HOME TRAINER — Z2 (no fan, door closed = heat protocol included)
Cadence 85-95. HR 130-145. Nap-sized block: start when baby sleeps, stop when baby wakes — even 30min counts.
No fueling needed under 60min. Hydrate after (sweat loss is high without fan).
This replaces easy runs: same aerobic signal, zero impact, zero logistics.
Keep the no-fan heat stimulus going through this week, then stop.
Medium mountain run 1h45 Z2 with poles. Smooth.
Full rest. Logistics: bib pickup times, drop bags, bus to Roubion, family plan for race weekend (who watches the baby, where they cheer).
Last 2h+ run. Z2, include 30min at race effort. Notice how easy race pace feels.
Family day.
Easy 40min. Core circuit x2 only — no weights this week.

Easy 40min + 5x20s strides.
MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
Full rest. SLEEP WEEK: tag-team night feeds with your partner this week if at all possible — every banked hour counts double now.
1h15 with 20min at race effort on a climb, poles. Last meaningful session.
Full rest. Pack drop bags. Mandatory kit check vs UTMB rules (2 headlamps, blanket, phone, cup, food/water reserves).
Relaxed 1h15 trail. Visualize: Roubion start, 4 cols, the sea appearing, the Promenade — and who's waiting for you there.
Full rest. Carbs trending up from today (+20%).
Easy 30min Z1. Hydrate all week. Carbs 8-10g/kg/day from Wednesday.
Easy 25min + 4 short strides. Legs should feel bouncy.
Travel day with the family. Compression socks. Walk 20min on arrival. Hydrate.
Shakeout 20min on the Promenade. Bib pickup. Early dinner, no experiments.

Rest. Feet up. Final kit check, flasks filled, pacing card in vest.
Be patient to km 30 — bank NOTHING, the race starts at km 70.
Early dinner. Sleep by 20h30 (bus to Roubion is early).

Details: 109km / 5,400m D+ — Nice Côte d'Azur by UTMB
WorkoutDescription:
*** RACE DAY — NICE 100K — 26 SEPT 2026 ***
Distance: 109km | D+: 5,400m
GOAL A: 17h (≈6:15/effort-km) | GOAL B: finish strong, sub-18h30
You ran Gypaète at 5:55/ekm at avg HR 122 — you have the engine. August was newborn mode: trust Goal A, accept Goal B without ego if the day says so.

PACING:
Climbs: 450-500 m/h, poles, Z2 max | Flats: 6:30-7:00/km Z1-Z2 | Descents: CONTROLLED, cadence 85+ — remember km 20 at Gypaète (HR 179): never again that early.
First 30km (high Mercantour): deliberately slow, Z1-Z2 — feel embarrassed by how easy it is.
Km 30-70: steady Z2. Aid stations <4min, NEVER sit. Target <30min total stopped (39min at Gypaète).
Km 70-109: the race starts here. The descents to the sea = where the time is won. Trust the downhill work.

NUTRITION (Gypaète-validated): 80-90g carbs/h | C90 hourly | bar every 2h | salt /45min | 500-700ml/h, more in afternoon heat | caffeine 100mg at h3, then every 3h.
HEAT: trained all summer on the no-fan trainer — still: ice/water on neck at every aid station from km 60.
NIGHT START: headlamp until ~7h30.

Walk ALL climbs. NEVER exceed Z3. Your kid is waiting on the Promenade.

POST-RACE
No running 7-10 days. Walk, swim, eat, sleep — well, baby-sleep.
Days 1-7: no running | Days 8-14: easy jogs | Week 3+: normal running.
First finish line as a father. Savor it.
